subcodes.title: Du’a’ li-Hurufi Bismillahi’l-Amna’i’il-Aqdas
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! Thou hast ever dwelt alone in Thy dominion of sanctity and majesty, and wilt evermore remain exalted in the celestial heights of holiness and glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لم تزل کنت منفرداً فی ملیک القدس والجلال و لا تزال کنت مرتفعاً فی علو سماء القدس والاجلال
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @creation of the world, @God's love for His own Essence, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @eternality vs. origination; creation from nothingness
